_comment: Symbol and notation reference for ANSI/ASME Y14.5 and ISO drawing standards. Injected into drawing reader context to improve feature recognition accuracy.

parentheses.meaning: REFERENCE dimension — informational only. NEVER use for blank_length_in or blank_width_in.

boxed.meaning: BASIC dimension — theoretical exact value used with GD&T tolerances. Use as nominal for positioning, not for blank size.

underlined.meaning: NOT TO SCALE — dimension shown does not match drawn geometry. Use the written value.

double_underline.meaning: Non-standard or special requirement — note carefully.

TYP.meaning: TYPICAL — dimension applies to all identical features unless otherwise noted.

REF.meaning: REFERENCE — same as parenthetical, ignore for sizing.

MAX_MIN.meaning: Limit dimension — use the specified limit for worst-case cost estimation.

hole_callout_terms.THRU: through hole — drill or laser the full thickness
hole_callout_terms.BLIND: hole does not go all the way through — drill only, no laser
hole_callout_terms.C'BORE: counterbore — stepped hole, flat bottom recess, process: cnc_mill counterbore
hole_callout_terms.C'SINK: countersink — angled recess for flat-head screws, process: cnc_mill countersink
hole_callout_terms.C'DRILL: center drill — starter hole for lathe work
hole_callout_terms.SPOTFACE: shallow flat-bottom recess for seating bolt heads, process: cnc_mill
hole_callout_terms.UNC: Unified National Coarse thread — process: tap
hole_callout_terms.UNF: Unified National Fine thread — process: tap
hole_callout_terms.NPT: National Pipe Taper thread — process: tap

Ra.name: Arithmetic mean roughness
Ra.note: Lower Ra = tighter finish = more expensive

PAINT.note: Look for color callout in notes

ANODIZE.note: Aluminum only. Type II unless specified.

BLACK OXIDE.note: Steel conversion coating — treat as finish op

NO FINISH.note: Raw material as-cut, no finish operation needed

material_form_codes._note: Appear in material callouts to identify raw stock form. Use to set part_form_type.

SHT.description: Sheet — thin flat stock, formed by press brake

PL.description: Plate — thicker flat stock, cut by laser or waterjet

RD.description: Round bar / rod — turned on lathe

HSS.description: Hollow Structural Section — square or rectangular tube

PIPE.description: Pipe — check schedule for wall thickness

material_spec_prefixes._note: Common ASTM/AMS designations. Use to identify material_key.
material_spec_prefixes.A500: A36_STEEL — structural tube (treat as steel for cost)
material_spec_prefixes.A513: A36_STEEL — DOM round tube (treat as steel)
material_spec_prefixes.316: 304_STAINLESS — marine-grade stainless (treat as 304 for cost estimate)
material_spec_prefixes.5052: 6061_ALUMINUM — sheet aluminum (treat as 6061 for cost estimate)
material_spec_prefixes.7075: 6061_ALUMINUM — high-strength aluminum (treat as 6061 for cost estimate)

third_angle.symbol: truncated cone with circle on right
third_angle.note: Top view above front, right side view to the right of front. Most US drawings.

first_angle.symbol: truncated cone with circle on left
first_angle.note: Top view below front, right side view to the left of front. European drawings.

view_labels.DETAIL: Enlarged view of a specific area
view_labels.AUXILIARY: Angled view showing true shape of inclined surface
view_labels.ISO: Isometric / pictorial view — for reference only, do not dimension from
